phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Praça da Ribeira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH PRAH-suh DUH ree-BAY-ruh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Praça da Ribeira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PRAH-suh DUH ree-BAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Praça da Ribeira.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Praça da Ribeira.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PRAH-suh DUH ree-BAY-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Praça da Ribeira.

phrases.text_local: Pode me sugerir um restaurante bom perto do hotel?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih MIH soo-zhih-REER OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih BOHNG PEHR-too DOO oo-TEHL?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um garçom ou fiscal de turismo na Praça da Ribeira. Eles conhecem as melhores opções da região.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG guh-ruh-SOHNG OHW feesh-KAHL DIH too-REEZH-moo NUH PRAH-suh DUH ree-BAY-ruh. EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng UHSH meh-LYOH-rihsh awp-SOHNYSH DUH reh-ZHEEOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a waiter or a tourism inspector at Praça da Ribeira. They know the best options in the area.

responses.english: Ask a waiter or a tourism inspector at Praça da Ribeira. They know the best options in the area.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG guh-ruh-SOHNG OHW feesh-KAHL DIH too-REEZH-moo NUH PRAH-suh DUH ree-BAY-ruh. EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng UHSH meh-LYOH-rihsh awp-SOHNYSH DUH reh-ZHEEOWN.
responses.french: Pergunte a um garçom ou fiscal de turismo na Praça da Ribeira. Eles conhecem as melhores opções da região.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Praça da Ribeira square is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Praça da Ribeira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH PRAH-suh DUH ree-BAY-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Praça da Ribeira is a historic square near the river, famous for its lively atmosphere and views of the Dom Luís I Bridge.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Praça da Ribeira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PRAH-suh DUH ree-BAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Praça da Ribeira.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Praça da Ribeira.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PRAH-suh DUH ree-BAY-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Praça da Ribeira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Cais da Ribeira promenade is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Cais da Ribeira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEYESH DUH ree-BAY-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Cais da Ribeira is the main riverside promenade in Porto, lined with restaurants and rabelo boats.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Cais da Ribeira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEYESH DUH ree-BAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Cais da Ribeira.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Cais da Ribeira.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEYESH DUH ree-BAY-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Cais da Ribeira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Ponte D. Luís I lower deck is
phrases.text_local: Onde se acede ao piso inferior da Ponte D. Luís I?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH uh-SEH-dih OW PEE-zoo een-fih-REEOHR DUH POHNG-tih DEH. LOOEESH EE?
phrases.cultural_note: Designed by a disciple of Eiffel, the lower deck serves pedestrians and road traffic.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o piso inferior.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW PEE-zoo een-fih-REEOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the lower deck.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the lower deck.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW PEE-zoo een-fih-REEOHR.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o piso inferior.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach Escadaria das Verdadeiras
phrases.text_local: Como chego à Escadaria das Verdadeiras a partir daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo AH shkuh-duh-REEUH DUHSH veh-ruh-duh-DAY-ruhsh AH puh-ruh-TEER duh-KEE?
phrases.cultural_note: The stairs historically connected the upper town to the riverside washerwomen.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Escadaria das Verdadeiras.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH DUHSH veh-ruh-duh-DAY-ruhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Escadaria das Verdadeiras.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Escadaria das Verdadeiras.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH DUHSH veh-ruh-duh-DAY-ruhsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Escadaria das Verdadeiras.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Rabelo boat boarding gates are
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o local de embarque dos barcos Rabelo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW loo-KAHL DIH aym-BAH-ruh-kih DOOSH BAH-ruh-koosh ruh-BEH-loo?
phrases.cultural_note: Rabelo boats were traditionally used to transport port wine from the Douro valley.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as docas dos barcos Rabelo, no Cais da Ribeira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH DOH-kuhsh DOOSH BAH-ruh-koosh ruh-BEH-loo, NOO KEYESH DUH ree-BAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Rabelo boat docks at Cais da Ribeira.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Rabelo boat docks at Cais da Ribeira.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH DOH-kuhsh DOOSH BAH-ruh-koosh ruh-BEH-loo, NOO KEYESH DUH ree-BAY-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para as docas dos barcos Rabelo, no Cais da Ribeira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Rabelo boat boarding gate is
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza o portão de embarque dos Rabelo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AW poo-ruh-TOWN DIH aym-BAH-ruh-kih DOOSH ruh-BEH-loo?
phrases.cultural_note: Boarding areas are clearly marked with traditional blue ceramic tiles.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga os sinais azuis na calçada.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh OOSH see-NEYESH uh-ZOOEESH NUH kahl-SAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the blue signs on the pavement.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the blue signs on the pavement.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh OOSH see-NEYESH uh-ZOOEESH NUH kahl-SAH-duh.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga os sinais azuis na calçada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Escadaria das Verdadeiras is
phrases.text_local: Pode dizer-me onde fica a Escadaria das Verdadeiras?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih dee-ZEHR-MIH OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH DUHSH veh-ruh-duh-DAY-ruhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The stairs offer one of the most photographed views of the Douro River.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Escadaria das Verdadeiras.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH DUHSH veh-ruh-duh-DAY-ruhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Escadaria das Verdadeiras.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Escadaria das Verdadeiras.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH DUHSH veh-ruh-duh-DAY-ruhsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Escadaria das Verdadeiras.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Capela de São Nicolau is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Capela de São Nicolau nesta zona?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH kuh-PEH-luh DIH SOWN nee-koo-LOW NEHSH-tuh ZOH-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: This 17th-century chapel serves as a landmark for sailors and river workers.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is next to the Verdadeiras stairs.

responses.english: Good morning, it is next to the Verdadeiras stairs.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to find Praça da Ribeira square
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si arriva a Praça da Ribeira?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, KOH-mih SEE uh-REE-vuh AH PRAH-suh DUH ree-BAY-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Praça da Ribeira is the main square of the Ribeira district, lined with restaurants and offering views of the Douro River and the D. Luís I Bridge.

likely_response.local: È proprio qui, davanti a lei.
likely_response.pronunciation: ehg-RAH-vee proop-REEOO KEE, duh-vahnng-TEE AH LAY.
likely_response.translation_en: It's right here, in front of you.

responses.english: It's right here, in front of you.
responses.phonetic: ehg-RAH-vee proop-REEOO KEE, duh-vahnng-TEE AH LAY.
responses.french: È proprio qui, davanti a lei.
